 {"id":"bd-7237da","title":"Critical: Dolt server write persistence failure","description":"bd create reports success but beads are not persisted to database.

Symptoms:
- bd create returns success with issue ID
- bd show immediately after cannot find the issue
- bd list doesn't show newly created issues
- bd search may find them (JSONL-based?)

Observed during tech debt review session.

Related issues:
- bd doctor --server hardcodes 'beads' instead of reading database name from config (line 116)
- metadata.json says database: beads_rig but doctor checks 'beads'
- Connection pool issues: 'invalid connection' errors

This blocks all work tracking in the Dolt server environment.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"steve.yegge@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-24T07:50:16Z","created_by":"beads/crew/emma","updated_at":"2026-01-26T02:22:54Z","closed_at":"2026-01-26T02:22:54Z","close_reason":"Resolved by Dolt cleanup session - persistence verified working"}
 {"id":"bd-734vd","title":"Update docs for daemon CLI change (--start → start)","description":"dispatched_by: beads/crew/emma

Documentation says 'bd daemon --start' but CLI now uses 'bd daemon start'. Update all docs to use new subcommand syntax.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"beads/crew/fang","owner":"steve.yegge@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-14T03:34:32Z","created_by":"beads/crew/emma","updated_at":"2026-01-15T04:49:00Z","closed_at":"2026-01-15T04:49:00Z","work_type":"mutex"}
 {"id":"bd-73got","title":"Refactor beads-release formula to use gate step","description":"Update beads-release.formula.toml to use gate-based async for CI wait:

Replace the spin-wait `wait-ci` step with a proper gate step:

```toml
[[steps]]
id = "wait-ci"
title = "Await CI completion"
needs = ["push-tag"]
gate = "gh:run"
gate_hint = "release.yml"
timeout = "30m"
description = """
Gate step awaiting GitHub Actions release workflow.
Resolves automatically when workflow succeeds.
Escalates if workflow fails or times out.

No polling needed - Deacon patrol evaluates gates periodically.
"""
```

Depends on gate infrastructure being complete.

 {"id":"bd-74eak","title":"Review & merge PR #1026: fix(init) prevent init from worktrees","description":"dispatched_by: beads/crew/emma

Review and merge PR #1026: https://github.com/steveyegge/beads/pull/1026

## Summary
Prevents 'bd init' from running inside a git worktree. Worktrees should share the .beads database from the main repository.

## Changes
- Adds check in cmd/bd/init.go
- Error message guides users to use main repo or bd worktree create

## Review Checklist
- [ ] Pull the branch locally
- [ ] Run tests: go test ./...
- [ ] Verify the worktree check works correctly
- [ ] Merge with gh pr merge 1026 --repo steveyegge/beads --squash","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"beads/crew/dave","owner":"steve.yegge@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-12T02:14:06Z","created_by":"beads/crew/emma","updated_at":"2026-01-12T02:16:07Z","closed_at":"2026-01-12T02:16:07Z","work_type":"mutex"}
 {"id":"bd-7933b","title":"Issue 2","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"steve.yegge@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-12T02:16:03Z","created_by":"beads/crew/wolf","updated_at":"2026-01-27T03:48:42Z","closed_at":"2026-01-27T03:48:42Z","close_reason":"Test artifact - cleaning up","work_type":"mutex"}
 {"id":"bd-7bcrw","title":"Bootstrap: Add transaction timeout for large JSONL files","description":"Large JSONL files could take a long time to import. The bootstrap transaction has no timeout:

```go
tx, err := s.db.BeginTx(ctx, nil)
```

Consider:
- Adding a configurable transaction timeout
- Progress reporting for large imports
- Batch commits for very large files

Location: internal/storage/dolt/bootstrap.go:114

(Moved from hq-0pzhk)","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-21T01:37:24Z","created_by":"mayor","updated_at":"2026-01-21T01:37:24Z","labels":["dolt-backend"],"work_type":"mutex"}
 {"id":"bd-7cjc","title":"Leaky abstraction: beads.go creates sqlite.New directly","description":"attached_molecule: bd-wisp-bme
attached_at: 2026-01-27T04:08:51Z
dispatched_by: beads/crew/emma

**Found in:** internal/beads/beads.go:399, 728

**Issue:** Beads package directly instantiates SQLite storage:
```go
return sqlite.New(ctx, dbPath)  // line 399
store, err := sqlite.New(ctx, dbPath)  // line 728
```

**Impact:** These code paths bypass the factory and backend configuration. Will always use SQLite even if Dolt is configured.

**Recommendation:**
1. Use storage/factory to create storage instances
2. Pass storage instance from caller rather than creating internally
3. Or accept backend configuration parameter

**Severity:** Medium - inconsistent backend selection","status":"hooked","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"beads/polecats/quartz","owner":"steve.yegge@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-27T03:50:03Z","created_by":"beads/crew/darcy","updated_at":"2026-01-27T04:08:52Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-7cjc","depends_on_id":"bd-ats9.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-26T19:50:27Z","created_by":"beads/crew/darcy"},{"issue_id":"bd-7cjc","depends_on_id":"bd-wisp-bme","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-26T20:08:48Z","created_by":"beads/crew/emma"}]}
 {"id":"bd-7ieqt","title":"bd hooks install: add --jj flag for jujutsu mode","description":"Currently jujutsu hooks are only installed automatically during bd init.

Should add a --jj flag to 'bd hooks install' so users can:
- Manually reinstall jj-mode hooks
- Switch from git hooks to jj hooks if they colocate an existing repo

Usage: bd hooks install --jj

Related: hq-ew1mbr.12 (jujutsu support)","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"steve.yegge@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-21T03:08:24Z","created_by":"beads/crew/lizzy","updated_at":"2026-01-21T03:08:24Z","work_type":"mutex"}
 {"id":"bd-7m0d2","title":"Formula parser: recognize gate step fields","description":"Add support for gate-related fields in formula step definitions:

- `gate`: Gate type (gh:run, gh:pr, timer, bead, human)
- `gate_hint`: Optional hint for auto-discovery (e.g., workflow name)
- `timeout`: Duration before escalation

Update internal/formula/types.go and parser.go to recognize these fields.

 {"id":"bd-7s5v5","title":"Document bd reset --hard or implement if missing (GH#922)","description":"## GitHub Issue
https://github.com/steveyegge/beads/issues/922

## Problem
User reports `bd admin reset --hard` and `bd admin reset --skip-init` commands are missing/undocumented. When doing `bd reset` followed by `bd init`, old data keeps coming back.

## Investigation Needed
1. Check if `--hard` flag exists in current codebase
2. If exists: document it properly
3. If not: determine if it should be added or if there's an alternative workflow

## Files to check
- `cmd/bd/reset.go` or similar
- `cmd/bd/admin.go`
- Documentation files","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"steve.yegge@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-12T10:46:53Z","created_by":"beads/crew/emma","updated_at":"2026-01-12T10:47:45Z","closed_at":"2026-01-12T10:47:45Z","work_type":"mutex"}
 {"id":"bd-7wr2w","title":"Fix: bd sync fails on fresh clone v0.46.0 (GH#963)","description":"dispatched_by: beads/crew/dave

GitHub issue #963. bd sync fails on freshly cloned repos in v0.46.0.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"beads/crew/grip","created_at":"2026-01-10T06:19:57Z","created_by":"beads/crew/dave","updated_at":"2026-01-10T06:30:06Z","closed_at":"2026-01-10T06:30:06Z","work_type":"mutex"}
 {"id":"bd-7xeks","title":"hook.go: Consolidate duplicate JSONL file lists into shared constant","description":"The lists of JSONL files are duplicated and inconsistent:
- Line 364 (SQLite path): includes beads.jsonl (legacy)
- Line 441 (Dolt path): excludes beads.jsonl

Should extract to a shared constant like:
var jsonlFiles = []string{".beads/issues.jsonl", ".beads/deletions.jsonl", ".beads/interactions.jsonl"}

And decide whether beads.jsonl (legacy) should be included or removed.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"steve.yegge@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-21T02:10:42Z","created_by":"beads/crew/elinor","updated_at":"2026-01-21T02:16:11Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T02:16:11Z","labels":["cleanup","hooks"],"work_type":"mutex"}

**Output:** List of issues found with severity ratings, filed as new beads if significant.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"beads/crew/darcy","owner":"steve.yegge@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-27T03:41:14Z","created_by":"mayor","updated_at":"2026-01-27T03:50:33Z","closed_at":"2026-01-27T03:50:33Z","close_reason":"Review complete. Filed 5 issues for leaky abstractions plus 1 summary issue. See bd-e3q2 for full findings.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ats9.1","depends_on_id":"bd-ats9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-26T19:41:14Z","created_by":"mayor"}]}
 {"id":"bd-ats9.2","title":"Review internal/sync/ - federation and JSONL handling","description":"Review the sync package for v3 readiness.

**Check for:**
- ShouldExportJSONL() usage - is it checked everywhere it should be?
- Federation mode handling (Classic, Dolt+JSONL, Dolt native, belt-and-suspenders)
- Import/export consistency
- Sync mode configuration paths
- Race conditions in concurrent sync scenarios

**Known bugs:** bd-ixip and bd-a9ka show this pattern isn't consistently applied.

**Output:** List of issues found with severity ratings, filed as new beads if significant.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"beads/crew/elinor","owner":"steve.yegge@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-27T03:41:16Z","created_by":"mayor","updated_at":"2026-01-27T03:49:48Z","closed_at":"2026-01-27T03:49:48Z","close_reason":"Review complete. Found 3 bugs total (1 new: bd-u9yv) and 1 architectural improvement (bd-t8x8). All issues filed with severity ratings.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ats9.2","depends_on_id":"bd-ats9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-26T19:41:15Z","created_by":"mayor"}],"comments":[{"id":25,"issue_id":"bd-ats9.2","author":"beads/crew/elinor","text":"## Review Complete: internal/sync/ (actually syncbranch/ and related)

### Summary
The task asked to review 'internal/sync/' but this directory doesn't exist. The relevant code is in:
- cmd/bd/sync*.go - main sync command and export logic
- cmd/bd/daemon_sync.go - daemon sync operations
- cmd/bd/autoflush.go - auto-flush/export
- internal/syncbranch/ - sync branch worktree management

### Issues Found

**HIGH Severity - ShouldExportJSONL() not checked:**
1. **bd-ixip (known)**: autoflush.go:flushToJSONLWithState() writes JSONL without checking sync mode
2. **bd-a9ka (known)**: create.go:flushRoutedRepo() writes JSONL without checking sync mode
3. **bd-u9yv (NEW)**: daemon_sync.go:exportToJSONLWithStore() (line 64) and its callers performExport() (line 516) and performSync() (line 832) don't check sync mode

**Architecture Concern:**
4. **bd-t8x8 (NEW)**: ShouldExportJSONL() checks are scattered in calling code, not centralized in export functions. This leads to missed checks.

### Places that DO correctly check:
- sync.go:517 - before git pull operations  
- sync.go:721 - in doExportSync()

### Race Conditions
No race conditions found. The only goroutine usage in syncbranch is for a timeout message helper with proper channel synchronization.

### Import/Export Consistency
- Import operations (sync_import.go, autoimport.go) don't need sync mode checks - they always read from JSONL
- Export operations need to respect dolt-native mode to avoid unwanted JSONL writes

### Recommendations
1. Fix bd-ixip, bd-a9ka (known), and bd-u9yv (new)
2. Implement bd-t8x8 to centralize the check
3. Add integration tests for dolt-native mode JSONL behavior","created_at":"2026-01-27T03:49:43Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-ats9.3","title":"Review cmd/bd/ - CLI command handlers","description":"Review CLI commands for v3 readiness.

**Check for:**
- Commands that bypass storage abstraction
- Inconsistent flag handling for backend/sync mode options
- Commands that assume specific backend behavior
- Error messages that expose internal implementation details
- Missing commands for v3 workflows (migration, mode switching)

**Output:** List of issues found with severity ratings, filed as new beads if significant.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"beads/crew/jane","owner":"steve.yegge@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-27T03:41:17Z","created_by":"mayor","updated_at":"2026-01-27T03:50:23Z","closed_at":"2026-01-27T03:50:23Z","close_reason":"Review complete. Found 20 issues (3 HIGH, 13 MEDIUM, 4 LOW). Filed 6 child beads for significant findings.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ats9.3","depends_on_id":"bd-ats9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-26T19:41:17Z","created_by":"mayor"}]}
-{"id":"bd-ats9.3.1","title":"daemon_sync_branch.go assumes JSONL always exists","description":"attached_molecule: bd-wisp-tpb
attached_at: 2026-01-27T04:10:12Z
dispatched_by: beads/crew/emma

**File:** cmd/bd/daemon_sync_branch.go:80-82

**Issue:** Code calls findJSONLPath() directly and fails with 'JSONL path not found' if missing. In dolt-native mode, JSONL may not exist - sync should use Dolt remotes instead.

**Impact:** Daemon sync-branch fails in dolt-native mode.
**Fix:** Check sync mode before assuming JSONL exists. In dolt-native, use Dolt sync mechanisms.

**Severity:** HIGH","status":"done","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"beads/polecats/topaz","owner":"steve.yegge@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-27T03:49:46Z","created_by":"beads/crew/jane","updated_at":"2026-01-27T04:13:29Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ats9.3.1","depends_on_id":"bd-ats9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-26T19:49:45Z","created_by":"beads/crew/jane"},{"issue_id":"bd-ats9.3.1","depends_on_id":"bd-wisp-tpb","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-26T20:10:11Z","created_by":"beads/crew/emma"}],"comments":[{"id":26,"issue_id":"bd-ats9.3.1","author":"beads/polecats/topaz","text":"Fix: Added ShouldExportJSONL() checks to syncBranchCommitAndPushWithOptions and syncBranchPull functions. In dolt-native mode, these functions now return early (true, nil) to skip JSONL operations since Dolt handles sync through its own Push/Pull methods. This prevents 'JSONL path not found' errors when JSONL doesn't exist in dolt-native mode.","created_at":"2026-01-27T04:13:40Z"}]}
+{"id":"bd-ats9.3.1","title":"daemon_sync_branch.go assumes JSONL always exists","description":"attached_molecule: bd-wisp-tpb
attached_at: 2026-01-27T04:10:12Z
dispatched_by: beads/crew/emma

**File:** cmd/bd/daemon_sync_branch.go:80-82

**Issue:** Code calls findJSONLPath() directly and fails with 'JSONL path not found' if missing. In dolt-native mode, JSONL may not exist - sync should use Dolt remotes instead.

**Impact:** Daemon sync-branch fails in dolt-native mode.
**Fix:** Check sync mode before assuming JSONL exists. In dolt-native, use Dolt sync mechanisms.

**Severity:** HIGH","notes":"Implemented: Added ShouldExportJSONL() checks to syncBranchCommitAndPushWithOptions and syncBranchPull in daemon_sync_branch.go. In dolt-native mode, these functions return early to skip JSONL operations. Tests pass.","status":"done","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"beads/polecats/topaz","owner":"steve.yegge@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-27T03:49:46Z","created_by":"beads/crew/jane","updated_at":"2026-01-27T04:14:44Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ats9.3.1","depends_on_id":"bd-ats9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-26T19:49:45Z","created_by":"beads/crew/jane"},{"issue_id":"bd-ats9.3.1","depends_on_id":"bd-wisp-tpb","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-26T20:10:11Z","created_by":"beads/crew/emma"}],"comments":[{"id":26,"issue_id":"bd-ats9.3.1","author":"beads/polecats/topaz","text":"Fix: Added ShouldExportJSONL() checks to syncBranchCommitAndPushWithOptions and syncBranchPull functions. In dolt-native mode, these functions now return early (true, nil) to skip JSONL operations since Dolt handles sync through its own Push/Pull methods. This prevents 'JSONL path not found' errors when JSONL doesn't exist in dolt-native mode.","created_at":"2026-01-27T04:13:40Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-ats9.3.2","title":"Error messages expose internal implementation details","description":"**Files:** Multiple files in cmd/bd/

**Examples:**
- daemon_sync_branch.go:82 - 'JSONL path not found'
- daemon_sync.go:490 - 'Error: JSONL path not found'  
- nodb.go:50 - 'failed to load issues from %s: %w' (exposes jsonlPath)
- daemon_guard.go:19 - Exposes that Dolt is 'single-process only' and suggests SQLite

**Issue:** Users see backend-specific terminology (JSONL, Dolt internals) in error messages. Should use abstract storage terminology.

**Fix:** Replace 'JSONL path not found' with 'storage not found'. Replace backend-specific messages with generic ones.

**Severity:** HIGH","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"beads/crew/lizzy","owner":"steve.yegge@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-27T03:49:47Z","created_by":"beads/crew/jane","updated_at":"2026-01-27T04:12:32Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ats9.3.2","depends_on_id":"bd-ats9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-26T19:49:47Z","created_by":"beads/crew/jane"}]}
 {"id":"bd-ats9.3.3","title":"Add bd backend and bd sync mode subcommands","description":"**Issue:** Backend/sync mode management isn't discoverable.

**Current state:**
- Backend can only be set at init time via --backend flag
- Sync mode set via bd sync --set-mode (flag, not subcommand)
- No way to list available backends or modes

**Proposed commands:**
- `bd backend list` - Show available backends (jsonl, dolt, sqlite)
- `bd backend show` - Show current backend
- `bd sync mode list` - Show available sync modes  
- `bd sync mode current` - Show current sync mode
- `bd sync mode set <mode>` - Set sync mode with validation

**Severity:** MEDIUM - Important for v3 discoverability","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"beads/crew/lydia","owner":"steve.yegge@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-27T03:49:49Z","created_by":"beads/crew/jane","updated_at":"2026-01-27T04:12:50Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ats9.3.3","depends_on_id":"bd-ats9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-26T19:49:48Z","created_by":"beads/crew/jane"}]}
 {"id":"bd-ats9.3.4","title":"Add consistent --backend flag to key commands","description":"**Issue:** The --backend flag only exists on init command.

**Commands that should have backend awareness:**
- `bd doctor` - Should validate backend-specific health
- `bd export` - Should allow specifying export format
- `bd daemon` - Should support backend selection
- `bd migrate` - Should show source/target backends clearly

**Fix:** Add --backend flag (or use current backend from config) to commands that interact with backends.

**Severity:** MEDIUM","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"steve.yegge@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-27T03:49:51Z","created_by":"beads/crew/jane","updated_at":"2026-01-27T03:49:51Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ats9.3.4","depends_on_id":"bd-ats9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-26T19:49:51Z","created_by":"beads/crew/jane"}]}
